description: Regulations.gov is the U.S. federal rulemaking portal where the public can find regulatory dockets, documents, and comments and submit comments on proposed rules. It also offers bulk download access to regulatory data through its website.
summary: Regulations.gov exposes one documented REST API at `https://api.regulations.gov/v4`, used for searching documents, comments, and dockets and for comment posting when the API key is specially enabled; it uses an `X-Api-Key` header.
